title: Fix Left/Right Pagination Buttons Showing Index Instead of Title
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the left and right navigation buttons on the Reports and Dashboards page to show the report/dashboard title, not a numeric index.
description: Bug fix: the left and right navigation buttons were displaying a numeric index instead of the report or dashboard title. Fixed across all three environments (dev, stage, prod).
acceptance_criteria: Navigation buttons display the report/dashboard title
Index numbers are not shown in the button labels
ux_changes: Fixed navigation buttons to display report/dashboard titles instead of numeric indices.
implementation_notes: The button label was bound to the row index instead of the name field. Fixed across dev, stage, and prod.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed on all 3 environments (dev, stage, prod).
